programme.title: Christmas In Alaska
programme.desc: (PG) Two rival journalists competing for the same promotion get stranded in snowy Alaska after an emergency landing. They find themselves caught up in an unexpected Christmas romance.

programme.title: Just Like A Christmas Movie
programme.sub-title: Season 2023 - Just Like a Christmas Movie
programme.desc: (PG) On the verge of a massive deadline, a cynical workaholic must turn Christmas around in her small town after a small mishap.

programme.title: Love At First Like
programme.desc: (PG) A cynical journalist is assigned to cover a handsome celebrity who offers dating advice for women, and ends up finding there's more than meets the eye.

programme.title: Bad Tutor
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
